title: Better F5
description: Adds two side views to F5 and customizability for zoom. A whole new perspective.
body:
## Better F5
This mod adds two new side views (left and right) to F5, the ability to change defualt zoom, and the ability to change order of F5 perspectives. 

I searched a bit for a mod like this and couldn't find any so I made this. I couldn't find anything like this but if there are mods with similar functionalty, my bad D:

This mod can be useful for seeing objects or entities to your left / right easily, getting good angles for content creation, and more.
